creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 224906
patch for x11-themes/kde-icons-noia

I just finished a change for kde-icons-nuovext2
which requires this port, and noticed that this
port doesn't have a LICENSE or MAINTAINER. So
the patch attached to this pr(1) fixes that.

Changes
Makefile (adds LICENSE && MAINTAINER)
pkg-descr (removes one of the broken WWW entries)

That's it.

Thanks!

--Chris

NOTE as this port is maintained by ports@
approval is implicit.
